headline: PepsiCo’s Sustainability Role At 2026 Summit And What It Means For Valuation
summary: PepsiCo (NasdaqGS:PEP) is set to play a major role at Sustainability LIVE: The US Summit in April 2026. The company’s sustainability leaders will join keynote sessions with other large organizations. Discussions will focus on the evolving role of Chief Sustainability Officers and how they influence business transformation. For investors watching PepsiCo, this development sits at the intersection of consumer brands and corporate sustainability. The company operates a global food and beverage...
